title: Hanging Vines
description: Gives vines a hanging model type, with connected textures!
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Hanging Vines** gives vines a hanging model type, and moves its top texture up by 0.99, so and does not collide with the block above it. Best when used with [Connected Vines](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-vines) so it is included by default.
